title: Desolate
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Desolate.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The ''Desolate'']]
The '''''Desolate''''' was a massive biologically engineered [[Starship/Legends|starship]] in the dimension of [[Otherspace]]. It was captained by [[Ber'asco]] and contained the [[Hall of Contests]]. Used by the [[Charon/Legends|Charon]], it was amorphous and over 450 meters long. At both ends of the ship were caps of mysterious light, while the ship was controlled by a large brain located at its top. After the hyperdrive was linked to the main computer, the ship was able to jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], but crashed into [[Stronghold (planet)|Stronghold]]. The ship was destroyed, though 200 Charon bioscientists and warriors survived.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Otherspace (adventure)|''Otherspace'']]
*''[[Otherspace II: Invasion]]''
